meta.universe_note: Ostium-tradeable pairs only (EUR/JPY + USD/ZAR excluded -- gTrade-only)
meta.engine: 3-engine: our Ostium-cost engine (candidate) + vectorbt + backtesting.py (independent confirmation floor, both pooled PF>1)

bollinger_band_bounce.long: prior close below bb_lo, current close back above bb_lo, RSI > 50
bollinger_band_bounce.short: prior close above bb_up, current close back below bb_up, RSI < 50
bollinger_band_bounce.desc: Bollinger Band bounce: pierce-and-return with RSI trend context

cipher_b_wavetrend_ema.long: close > EMA50 > EMA200 AND wt1 crosses above wt2 from below 0 AND RSI < 50 (oversold bias)
cipher_b_wavetrend_ema.short: close < EMA50 < EMA200 AND wt1 crosses below wt2 from above 0 AND RSI > 50
cipher_b_wavetrend_ema.desc: Cipher B WaveTrend oversold cross in EMA bullish/bearish stack

freqtrade_sma_ema_offset_protect.long: close < ema50*0.978 AND (ewo>5.835 AND rsi<55) OR ewo < -19.909
freqtrade_sma_ema_offset_protect.desc: EWO offset protect: buy dip below EMA50 discount with Elliott Wave Oscillator confirm

may_usd_strength_seasonality.long: not used (USD-strength bias means short AUD/NZD; long side would be USD pairs)
may_usd_strength_seasonality.short: first trading day of May (AUD/USD, NZD/USD tend to fall in May - USD strength)
may_usd_strength_seasonality.desc: May USD-strength seasonal: short AUD/USD and NZD/USD at May open, hold through month
may_usd_strength_seasonality.source: day_trading_swing_trading_the_currency_market_tech Ch.7 Other Cases of Seasonality May Figs 7.6-7.7

rsi_sma200_dual_threshold.desc: RSI dual-threshold mean reversion with SMA200 trend gate
rsi_sma200_dual_threshold.source: FMZQuant/Larry Connors RSI mean reversion (medium.com/@FMZQuant); DataCamp Python implementation

rsi_stochastic_ma150.long: close > sma200 AND rsi < 30 AND stoch_k < 30
rsi_stochastic_ma150.short: close < sma200 AND rsi > 70 AND stoch_k > 70
rsi_stochastic_ma150.desc: SMA200 trend + RSI + Stochastic pullback mean-reversion; proxy for MA150/RSI3 original

tall_pattern_height_filter.long: Range/close >= 0.055 (tall bar) and close breaks above bar high[1]
tall_pattern_height_filter.short: Range/close >= 0.055 (tall bar) and close breaks below bar low[1]
tall_pattern_height_filter.desc: Tall-pattern height filter: breakout only when event bar height-percent exceeds the historical median of ~5.5%
tall_pattern_height_filter.source: encyclopedia_of_chart_patterns_2nd_ed_thomas_n_bulkowski -- Ch.60-63 Size and Volume Statistics tables 60.6-63.6
